---
description: "Get a quick status report on the company — current phase, recent activity, blockers, and team status"
agent: "liaison"
---

Give me a comprehensive status report on the company. Include:
1. Current project phase
2. What the team has been working on recently (check latest logs)
3. Any blockers or risks
4. Current team composition
5. Budget status (spent vs available)
6. Key recent decisions

Keep it concise but complete.
